flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Illinois Chicago fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Illinois Chicago are 22% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.7k vs $56.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Illinois Chicago rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (36.5% → 41.7%).
